acceptance_targets: [ch11-prose-001] Pass if each revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:133, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:399 ends on a concrete image, action, or consequence rather than an abstract paraphrase of theme, and if none of those paragraphs merely restates what the immediately preceding dialogue already made legible.

[ch11-prose-002] Pass if, in the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:185, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:303, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:395, no more than two still use the current not-X/but-or-only-Y construction and the replacements remain clear without relying on the same binary pivot.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if each revised passage anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:133, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:399 ends on a concrete image, action, or consequence rather than an abstract paraphrase of theme, and if none of those paragraphs merely restates what the immediately preceding dialogue already made legible.
findings.problem: Several paragraphs stop after strong concrete material and explain the institutional or moral meaning the reader has already understood. The commentary is intelligent, but in aggregate it softens the chapter's hardness by paraphrasing its own subtext instead of trusting the scene evidence.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:133, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:141, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:317, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:399, either cut the thematic gloss outright or replace it with a fresh sensory or social consequence grounded in Marisol's body, the room, or the objects already present. Let the invoice, wrapper, gate, passcard, and platform logistics carry the indictment instead of summarizing what the company or plan means.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, in the revised passages anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:185, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:303, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:395, no more than two still use the current not-X/but-or-only-Y construction and the replacements remain clear without relying on the same binary pivot.
findings.problem: The prose leans repeatedly on the same binary-negation hinge: not X, but Y; not X, only Y. Used once, the pattern sharpens emphasis. Repeated across the chapter, it becomes audible as a house tic and flattens sentence music.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least three of the repeated hinges at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:123, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:185, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:195, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:303, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:395 into different sentence shapes driven by image, action, or cadence rather than denial-then-correction. Keep no more than one or two of the current hinges if you want the pattern to survive as a deliberate choice.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
